title: torilis nemoralis
intro: Torilis nemoralis, also known as Hedge Parsley or Wild Chervil, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Torilis nemoralis include its ability to treat digestive problems, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues like colds and bronchitis. Torilis nemoralis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
